articles.title: India's central bank revives push to isolate banks from crypto: Report

Institutional Bitcoin Adoption Explained: How Blackrock, Fidelity and Others Embraced BTC
articles.summary: Institutional adoption is when organizations such as asset managers, corporations, hedge funds, banks, pension funds, and insurers get involved in crypto. This can mean investing in bitcoin directly or building products and services around it. The trend accelerated sharply after spot bitcoin ETFs launched in January 2024 and now spans most categories of regulated institutional […]

articles.title: Teen ‘Scattered Spider’ suspect extradited to US over $8M crypto ransom
articles.summary: Peter Stokes, 19, has been charged in the US for allegedly taking part in a hacking group’s unsuccessful $8 million crypto ransom scheme.
